message.content:
Here are some solid, reliable tool brands that are great for building a home toolbox. These brands are known for durability, good warranties, and consistent performance:

• **DeWalt** – Very dependable power tools and hand tools; great for DIY and professional use.  
• **Milwaukee** – Excellent build quality, especially for cordless power tools.  
• **Makita** – Smooth, reliable power tools with long-lasting batteries.  
• **Bosch** – Well‑engineered tools, especially good for drills and measuring tools.  
• **Craftsman** – Good quality at a reasonable price; widely available.  
• **Kobalt** – Solid mid‑range tools from Lowe’s, good warranties.  
• **Husky** – Affordable, reliable hand tools from Home Depot.  
• **Stanley** – Classic, dependable basic hand tools.  
• **Klein Tools** – High‑quality tools for electrical work.  
• **Wera** – Excellent screwdrivers and precision tools.  

If you want, I can also suggest a list of essential tools for your first home setup.
